banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Erika Mustermann, who has forgotten her Steuer-Identifikationsnummer and requests BZSt mail it again to her current registered address. All names, dates, and addresses below are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information. This exact mock data was used to drive the live form end-to-end (short of the final submit click) during authoring — see VERIFICATION.md.
